params.name: Portrait of Peter I
params.description:
On Apr 6, 1820 AD, Nikitin painted Peter I in armor.
Peter I was a Czar and the first emperor of Russia, and the most impactful one in Russian history. He was a great politician and a farseeing reformer. Under his leadership, Russia became one of the most powerful countries in Europe. Peter I is in armor in the painting, wearing the Order of St. Andrew the Apostle with a white scarf on the neck, coming across as a resolute, assertive, confident ruler.
